Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #5761.

Howard J. Berman, Esq. and Corey Davis-Scida, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Teresa M. Sturgis, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants James Sturgis, McCracken & Son and Citimortage, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant James Sturgis on July 26, 2007.
Default was entered against defendant McCracken & Son on September 24, 2008.
Default was entered against defendant Citimortgage, Inc. on September 24, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Teresa M. Sturgis, and against the Defaulted Defendants James Sturgis, McCracken & son and Citimortage, Inc. as follows:

Plaintiff Teresa M. Sturgis is entitled to a 1/2 interest in the subject property located at 42 Jennings Court, APN 4991-177, San Francisco, CA. Alexander Nayberg of Allegro Realty is appointed as the Real Estate Agend to sell the subject property. Under the present circumstatnces, sale of the property and division of the proceeds would be more equitable than division of the property. Therefore, the Court Orders that the subject property be sold, and the proceeds divided amoung the parties according to their respective interests.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Partition Action Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Corey Davis-Scida, Esq. for Plaintiff: Teresa M. Sturgis, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to Nov. 20, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
